rationale: All four scheduled task creation events (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) correspond to well-known, legitimate software components: Npcap's watchdog task (A0) pointing to a standard Npcap installation path, Mozilla Firefox's default browser agent (EV-001) authored by Mozilla, and two Aurora-Agent update tasks (EV-002, EV-003) authored by Nextron Systems — a reputable endpoint security vendor. The Npcap task runs as SYSTEM but uses 'LeastPrivilege' run level and invokes a standard .bat file from the Npcap program directory, consistent with normal Npcap installation behavior. No suspicious command-line arguments, encoded payloads, unusual paths, or unknown authors are present across any of the events.
